    "execution_rule":  {
                           "match_required":  [

                                              ],
                           "marker_fields":  [

                                             ],

                                               ],
                           "inv_code_binding":  {

                                                }
                       },
    "product":  {
                    "product_name":  "Diba",
                    "sku_count":  1,
                    "unique_inv_main_count":  1,
                    "unique_inv_acc_values":  [

                                              ],
                    "rules":  [
                                  {
                                      "when":  {
                                                   "inv_main":  {
                                                                    "not":  null
                                                                }
                                               },
                                      "bom_rows":  [
                                                       {
                                                           "sequence_no":  1,
                                                           "component_group":  "MAIN",

                                                       }
                                                   ]
